text: Honored to receive the UCLA Dean's Honors List distinction for Fall, Winter, and Spring quarters of the 2025–2026 academic year.
Started as a Group Leader and Volunteer Tutor with the Global Cultural Education Foundation, including a two-week immersion trip to Taiwan.
Began my undergraduate studies at UCLA, pursuing a B.A. in Business Economics.
Joined the Stanford Cyber Policy Center as a Research Assistant, working on social media data collection and analysis.
